chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.S-169 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on office objections 1 to 4, 8, 9 and 10 and reply of advocate as at “A” 2. For hearing of CMA No.1562/2025 (u/s 561-A, Cr.PC) 3. For hearing of main case --------------------------------------------- 21.04.2025 Mr. Yahya Iqbal, advocate for petitioner Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh Mr. Muhammad Javed, A.A.G. PI Malik Riaz, SHO PS Boat Basin, DSP Muhammad Shahid on behalf of SSP South Zone, Karachi, PI Haji Liaquat Ali of PS Boat Basain ------------------------------------- Petitioner Asif Sattar has filed this petition through attorney Irfan Ahmed against the harassment caused by official respondents. Notices were issued to the official respondents. Statement has been filed by SHO P.S. Boat Basin, respondent No.3 and learned A.A.G. makes statement at bar that official respondents will not cause any harassment to the petitioner in future. In view of such statements, learned counsel for petitioner does not press this petition, the same accordingly dismissed along with pending application(s). However, official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordingly with law. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
